content.en:
"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, let go of your Immortal Holy Gate's Black Pattern Saint Ancestor, what is the situation?"

Zhan Zu was also a little confused.

He incarnated as a leader in the Battle Ancestor Realm, and he didn't usually pay much attention to it, so he didn't know what was going on.

The Immortal Ancestor told the Black Pattern Saint Ancestor about Ye Tian.

After hearing this, the Zhan Ancestor couldn't help but sneer: "Immortal Ancestor, the superior domain ancestor of your Immortal Holy Gate snatched the forbidden ancestral spring of my Zhan Sect Domain Ancestor, and if you were caught, you deserved it, and you even asked me to release you, you are embarrassed!"

The Immortal Ancestor hurriedly said: "Zhan Ancestor, it's useless to talk too much, let's talk about the conditions, besides, if there is one less Superior Domain Ancestor in the Dark Sacred Domain, the strength will also be weakened by one point, so there is no need to do so much!"

"I can't be the master of this matter, I can communicate with the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain, as for whether he is willing to let it go, that's his business!"

Zhan Zu Dao.

"Yes!"

The Immortal Ancestor nodded.

......

Xuanxu Holy Realm.

There was a special fluctuation in the Warworld Tower.

I saw an idea from the Battle Realm Tower of the Dark Sacred Realm directly across endless time and space, and descended to the War Realm Tower of the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

And this thought directly descended on Ye Tian's residence.

"Who?"

Ye Tian said solemnly.

"I, Zhan Zu!"

The figure of Zhan Zu emerged.

Although it was just a thought, Ye Tian felt an incomparable power, as if a thought of Zhan Zu could kill him.

This is the strength of the ancestors!

"I've seen Zhan Zu!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, you captured the Black Pattern Saint Ancestor of the Immortal Holy Gate?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian admitted.

Zhan Zu said: "The Immortal Ancestor of the Immortal Holy Gate has come to me, he wants to redeem the Black Pattern Holy Ancestor, if you are willing, just say a condition, if you are unwilling, even if you kill the Dark Holy Ancestor, it doesn't matter, the Battle Gate is not afraid of the Immortal Holy Gate!"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment.

If he killed the Black Striped Holy Ancestor, he would be completely against the Immortal Holy Gate, and he would also offend the Immortal Ancestor.

Moreover, killing the Black Pattern Saint Ancestor would not be of much help to him.

If you release the Black Pattern Saint Ancestor, you can also get some benefits.

"Zhan Zu, I chose to release the Black Pattern Saint Ancestor!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Tell me about your conditions, and then I will convey them to the Immortal Ancestor. Zhan Zu said lightly.

Ye Tian thought about what treasure to ask for?

Ordinary treasures are of no use to him, and a non-superior domain ancestor is not worth much, so he naturally asks for ordinary things.

After thinking about it, Ye Tian chose a treasure that would help him a little.

"I want the Cause and Effect Ancestral Soldier!"

Ye Tian asked.

The Ancestral Soldiers are the weapons of the ancestors of the Superior Domain, and the ordinary Holy Relic Saint Soldiers are of little help to them, while the Ancestral Soldiers can improve their combat effectiveness.

Of course, not all of the Superior Domain Ancestors had ancestral soldiers.

It is rumored that the ancestral soldiers are made of special materials, and how they are refined is only known to the ancestors.

Therefore, the ancestral soldiers were refined by the ancestors, as well as a very small number of half-step ancestors.

"Causal Ancestors, this thing is very rare!"

Zhan Zu smiled.

Ye Tian chose the causal ancestral soldier because he wanted to protect himself.

Although he has a copy body, what if the enemy kills his body through the copy?

There is no way to sever the causal connection between the copied body and the ontology, so if you have a causal ancestor, you can break the causal connection between the ontology and the copied body, completely making up for the last defect.

At that time, his copy body could be wasted at will, and even the ancestor who was good at the causal ancestral technique could not kill his body in the air from all kinds of infinite distances.

"I'll go to the Immortal Ancestor and talk to him, as for whether he wants to or not, I don't know!"

Zhan Zu laughed.

The other side.

The thought of the Battle Ancestor spoke: "Immortal Ancestor, Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor said, a causal ancestor soldier for a black-veined Saint Ancestor!"

"Causal Ancestor Soldier, does he really dare to ask for it? How rare is this thing, and it can only be refined by Causal Ancestor. There were no more than ten pieces in the entire Dark Sanctuary, and he actually wanted one!"

The Immortal Ancestor was furious.

"Immortal Ancestor, the words have been brought, whether you want it or not is your business. It's a big deal, you can ask the Ancestor of Cause and Effect to refine one, and you can spend a little price!"

Zhan Zu said with a smile.

"That's it, just give it to him, but it can only be the most general causal ancestral soldier, and I will send it over in ten years. During this period, he is not allowed to attack the Black Striped Saint Ancestor!"

Immortal Ancestor Dao.

"No problem!"

Zhanzu agreed.

In the blink of an eye, ten years have passed.

The Immortal Ancestor threw a small ball to the War Ancestor, and this small ball was the Causal Ancestor.

And Zhan Ancestor let Ye Tian enter the Zhan Ancestor Realm and handed the ball to Ye Tian.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, this is the Cause and Effect Ancestor, I have checked it, and the Immortal Ancestor has not done anything wrong. You took this Cause and Effect Ancestor Soldier, and let go of the Black Pattern Saint Ancestor!"

Zhan Zu Dao.

"Yes!"

Ye Tianying said.

Subsequently, Ye Tian released the Black Pattern War Ancestor.

When the Black Striped War Ancestor was freed, he breathed a sigh of relief, and he didn't have to look back and run away, for fear that Ye Tian would regret to arrest him again.

......

Xuanxu Holy Realm.

Ye Tian began to refine this Cause and Effect Ancestral Soldier.

It took thousands of years to finally refine it.

And this causal ancestral soldier is called the Void Fruit, and that's its name.

With the Void Fruit, Ye Tian could shield the causal connection between the copying body and the ontology, but the action of the copying body would not be affected.

"Very good cause and effect ancestral soldier, with this ancestral soldier, my shortcomings can really be regarded as making up for it!"

Ye Tian said happily.

It seems that because of the matter of the Black Striped Saint Ancestor, the Immortal Holy Gate has completely abandoned the Forbidden Ancestral Spring.

And this matter involves the Ancestor, even other forces do not dare to send a more powerful Peerless Domain Ancestor, otherwise it will not be good if it involves a war.

In addition, Ye Tian was indeed strong enough, and even the Black Pattern Saint Ancestor was captured, I am afraid that it is comparable to the average powerhouse of the late stage of the Peerless Domain Ancestor.

Among the major forces, many of them are strong enough to have such strength, and many of them are guarding the borders of the Dark Forbidden Realm to resist the Silent Annihilation Clan.

Therefore, this matter is over, and no one is going to fight the idea of Forbidden Ancestral Fist.

In the following days, Ye Tian had been cultivating penance, controlling his physical body, and constantly completing the transformation of the invincible domain body again and again.

Three Invincible Domain Body Transformations!

Four Invincible Domain Body Transformations!

Every time he transformed, Ye Tian's strength became much stronger.

Finally, after nearly ten billion years, Ye Tian was finally about to complete the ninth invincible domain transformation.
